---
title: "Estimating cycling potential on route networks in Accra and Kathmandu"
description: "R Lovelace, N Groot, M Adepeju, and M Padgham (2018). Estimating cycling potential on route networks in Accra and Kathmandu. *World Health Organization*."
date: "2018-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_estimating_2018"
citation-type: "report"
citation-type-label: "Report"
venue: "World Health Organization"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "R Lovelace"
  - "N Groot"
  - "M Adepeju"
  - "M Padgham"
abstract: "This research applies transport modeling techniques to evaluate the potential for cycling in Accra, Ghana, and Kathmandu, Nepal. It analyzes route networks to identify opportunities for active travel interventions in rapidly developing urban areas."
---

**Type:** Report
**Venue:** World Health Organization
**Year:** 2018

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This research applies transport modeling techniques to evaluate the potential for cycling in Accra, Ghana, and Kathmandu, Nepal. It analyzes route networks to identify opportunities for active travel interventions in rapidly developing urban areas.

## Citation

R Lovelace, N Groot, M Adepeju, and M Padgham (2018). Estimating cycling potential on route networks in Accra and Kathmandu. *World Health Organization*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@techreport{lovelace_estimating_2018,
	type = {Report},
	title = {Estimating cycling potential on route networks in {Accra} and {Kathmandu}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	abstract = {This research applies transport modeling techniques to evaluate the potential for cycling in Accra, Ghana, and Kathmandu, Nepal. It analyzes route networks to identify opportunities for active travel interventions in rapidly developing urban areas.},
	institution = {World Health Organization},
	author = {Lovelace, R and Groot, N and Adepeju, M and Padgham, M},
	year = {2018},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
